scene_title: Multidao medieval hipnotizada por pergaminho luminoso
narrative_beat: Figuras coloridas fixadas em tela que brilha

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid medieval crowd in red blue and gold robes gazing fixated at glowing luminous parchment that shines like a screen with expressions of uncritical hypnotic admiration in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the glowing luminous parchment-screen and the crowd's hypnotic fixation
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated data center with servers and cables in background
props: medieval crowd in red blue gold robes

composition.foreground: crowd and screen in vivid red blue gold

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, screen color bleed

mood.emotion: forty-seven million views in forty-eight hours — mass deception fulfilled

symbolism.primary: the medieval illustration of mass media addiction is now social media
symbolism.secondary: the parchment as phone screen — the same gesture across centuries

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
